title: I would like to have a Status column solely dedicated to % increases (10% increments, 5% increments, 2% increments) that cannot be regressed, meaning, if I reach 50% one day and I claim progress in a task, no one but a global admin is able to reset

posts.author: eugeniomarquezj (EUGENIO MARQUEZ)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to have a Status column solely dedicated to display progress in % increases (10% increments, 5% increments, 2% increments) that cannot be regressed, meaning, if I reach 50% one day and I claim progress in a task, no one but a global admin is able to reset.
